synopsis: Betrayed, beaten, and half drowned, former Jedi Dass Jennir clings to life while the town he vowed to save is torn by gang warfare. His only allies have been imprisoned, tortured, or shot. It looks like the bad guys might win this time... except for one thing: a Jedi never gives up. Dark Horse Comics promises "bad-assery on an epic scale" in this issue.
title: Dark Times #17: Blue Harvest, Part 5
